decisions_made.decision: Block UOW-003 instead of implementing from planning artifacts only.
decisions_made.rationale: The authoritative execution artifact execution/UOW-003/uow_spec.yaml is missing, and the scoped lesson requires stopping rather than guessing the execution contract.
Repo evidence shows valid in-scope controller families, but without the execution spec any code change would risk scope drift and mismatched Definition of Done coverage.
